citations.narrative:
Areas in the store were not being kept neat and free of clutter. At the front of the store where the dog display is located
and running back behind the counter to the dog exercise pen are two stand-alone shelving units and an empty mobile
reptile shelving unit that are no longer being used. These items are added clutter making it difficult to access the dog
display and interfere with general cleaning and a sanitary environment. This area is adjacent to the dog housing area
housing 10 puppies and the exercise pen which have accumulated shreds, shavings, and bedding material along the floor
and on surfaces around these shelving units. Animal areas must be kept neat and free of clutter, including equipment and
furniture to allow for proper husbandry practices.
To be corrected by: March 24, 2026

Areas in the store near the bird display were not being kept neat and free of clutter. Along the front of the bird display
area, housing 62 birds, is a shelving platform running the length of the display that is about three feet tall. This area has
acquired an accumulation of bird dust, feathers, and caging substrate on the top of the shelving and along the floor next to
the shelving and interfere with general cleaning and a sanitary environment. Housing facilities must be kept free of any
accumulation of waste materials and junk and kept neat and free of clutter to support proper husbandry practices and to
facilitate a routine cleaning schedule.
To be corrected by: March 24, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representative.
n
